title: User navigates to the confirmation dialog to turn off all demos
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos.
expected_result: The confirmation dialog appears with the text 'TURN OFF ALL DEMOS?' and a message explaining that users can view demos at any time.

title: User selects 'No' button in the confirmation dialog
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'No' button.
expected_result: The confirmation dialog closes, and the user remains in the settings or preferences section.

title: User selects 'Yes' button in the confirmation dialog
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'Yes' button.
expected_result: The confirmation dialog closes, and the user remains in the settings or preferences section.

title: User attempts to close the confirmation dialog without selecting a button
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | Attempt to close the confirmation dialog without selecting a button.

title: User attempts to navigate away from the confirmation dialog
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | Attempt to navigate away from the confirmation dialog by pressing the back button.

title: User selects 'No' button in the confirmation dialog and then selects 'Yes' button
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'No' button. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'Yes' button.
expected_result: The confirmation dialog closes, and the user remains in the settings or preferences section.

title: User selects 'Yes' button in the confirmation dialog and then selects 'No' button
test_steps: Open the mobile banking app. | Navigate to the settings or preferences section. | Locate and select the option to turn off all demos. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'Yes' button. | In the confirmation dialog, select the 'No' button.
expected_result: The confirmation dialog closes, and the user remains in the settings or preferences section.
